questions: racism er biruddhe ki kora jay?
answers: Racism is discrimination, prejudice, or hostility directed against someone based on their race or ethnicity. It can be individual, institutional, or systemic.
Racism holo kono manush ke tader race ba ethnicity er karone boisommo kora ba kharap behobar kora.
Racism affects people's mental health, job opportunities, education access, housing, and overall quality of life. It creates lasting trauma across generations.
To fight racism, educate yourself about its history and impacts, speak up against discriminatory behavior, support anti-racist policies, and listen to affected communities.

feelings.question: racism ki?
feelings.answer: Racism is a form of discrimination that targets people ir race or ethnicity. It can be individual, institutional, or systemic and has lasting effects on people's mental health, job opportunities, education access, housing, and overall quality of life. To fight racism, educate yourself about its history and impacts, speak up against discriminatory behavior, support anti-racist policies, and listen to affected communities.
